# Process-Reliabilist Epistemology

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 8722e3ac-7334-4795-b6d8-782566f04bfc
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can knowledge arise from cognitive abilities that are not virtues?](can-knowledge-arise-from-cognitive-abilities-that-are-not-virtues-antithesis-72b909e2-ef28-403f-84e4-ad1c201df89e.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is a true belief generated by a reliable cognitive process**, **A reliable cognitive process is one that produces more true beliefs than false ones**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is true due to the use of a reliable cognitive process**
